name: dev-workflow
description: Developer workflow skills — skill creation (skill-creator-advance), skill quality scoring (skill-judge, 8-dimension rubric), portable git-backed project memory (git-memory), multi-item proposal triage (proposal-critique), and deletion-first change critique (complexity-critique). Git コミット・メモリ・スキル品質評価・複雑度クリティーク。可攜式專案記憶・技能品質評估・提案審查・複雜度評析。
